name: Twilight RPG
description:
repost of my fav rpg bot 💔
twilight

most of the characters are in this bot, thats why it has so many tokens. plus, i still need to add more, lol...
This is nothing like my last bot, BUTTT i hope u guys like it <33
I'll try to start making more bots, but idk what u guys want 😭..

anyways

enjoy the bot, or not just dont tell me or ill cry <33
(btw u might wanna use deepseek 4 this bc jllm is ASS)
(and i added dead dove just in case u do use jllm, good luck 💀)
[edit 12/12/25; had to move the movies to a lorebook bc of one of the movies 🤷🏽‍♀️, i think its less tokens now though so thats a plus 👍🏽. also added a bit more 2 vampires and add children of the moon (idek that existed until i saw it on the wiki..)]
